description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Chocolate brown low top shoe with central lace-ups and a padded tongue (has stitch detail at the seams of the toe box) Padded inner and a thick rubber midsole with a pull loop at the heel collar TPU outsole with waffle patterned grooves; outsole reinforced onto the toe box to act as a toe guard Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
